zh.Salesbury, Blackburn, Lancashire, Englan: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩萊斯波利
zh.Salesbury, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾薩萊斯波利
zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Talbot於1425年出生在英國藍卡爾薩萊斯波利時，他的父親John Talbot of Salesbury37歲，母親Isabella de Clitheroe31歲。他於1441年與Margery Halton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩萊斯波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1452年住在英國英格蘭藍卡爾薩萊斯波利。他去世於1484年在英國藍卡爾薩萊斯波利享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Talbot于1425年出生在英国藍卡爾薩萊斯波利时，他的父亲John Talbot of Salesbury37岁，母亲Isabella de Clitheroe31岁。他于1441年与Margery Halton在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩萊斯波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1452年住在英国英格兰藍卡爾薩萊斯波利。他去世于1484年在英国藍卡爾薩萊斯波利享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Talbot was born in 1425, in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, his father, John Talbot of Salesbury, was 37 and his mother, Isabella de Clitheroe, was 31. He married Margery Halton in 1441, in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He lived in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom in 1452. He died in 1484, in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Talbot est né en 1425, à Salesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, John Talbot of Salesbury, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Isabella de Clitheroe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margery Halton en 1441, à Salesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Salesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1452. Il est décédé en 1484, à Salesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Talbot 1425 in Salesbury, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Talbot of Salesbury 37 und seine Mutter Isabella de Clitheroe 31. Er hat 1441 in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Margery Halton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1452 hat er in Salesbury, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb 1484 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Salesbury, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Talbot è nato il nel 1425 nel Salesbury, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, John Talbot of Salesbury, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Isabella de Clitheroe, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margery Halton nel 1441, nel Salesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Salesbury, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1452. Morì nel 1484, nel Salesbury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.Salesbury, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアサレスブリー

ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Talbotが1425年にイギリスランカシュアイアサレスブリーで生まれた時，父John Talbot of Salesburyは37歳，母Isabella de Clitheroeは31歳であった。1441年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサレスブリーでMargery Haltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年にはイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアサレスブリーに住んでいた。彼は1484年にイギリスランカシュアイアサレスブリーで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Talbot(이)가 1425년 영국 랭카실르 살일스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Talbot of Salesbury(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella de Clitheroe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1441년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 살일스버이에서 Margery Halton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1452년도에 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 살일스버이에서 살았다. 그는 1484년 영국 랭카실르 살일스버이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Salesbury, Blackburn, Lancashire, Englan: Salesbury, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Talbot nasceu em 1425, em Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Talbot of Salesbury, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Isabella de Clitheroe, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Halton em 1441, em Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1452. Ele faleceu em 1484, em Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Talbot родился в 1425 г. в местности сеилесбури, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Talbot of Salesbury было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella de Clitheroe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Halton в 1441 г. в местности сеилесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности сеилесбури, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в 1452 году. Он умер в 1484 г. в местности сеилесбури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Talbot nació en 1425, en Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Talbot of Salesbury, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Isabella de Clitheroe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margery Halton en 1441, en Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Vivió en Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1452. Murió en 1484, en Salesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
